title: Security: UAF in ui/ozone/platform/wayland/host/wayland_window.cc
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Use-after-free in ui/ozone/platform/wayland/host/wayland_window.cc  
  
**VERSION**   
  
Chrome Version: 101.0.4903.0  
Operating System: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
  
Run the test XdgVersionStableTest/WaylandWindowTest.DispatchesLocatedEventsT
